contract_enforcement.policy: Runner normalized invalid model units to the declared empty-output cannot-prove contract. This preserves benchmark honesty while keeping the raw model text in raw-generation-output.json or raw-repair-output.json.

notes: The proof uses the equality catalanHankelMatrix_eq_pathWeightMatrix from the same file, then applies lgv_nonpermutable. The nipatWeightSum evaluation to 1 is not yet proved; a lemma nipatWeightSum_dyckUnitArcWeight_one is needed. The xDecreasing/yIncreasing conditions are trivially satisfied because the coordinates are linear in the index. The proof is incomplete due to the missing lemma.
